headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) Acquires 96.22% of JDE Peet’s
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP) is one of the 10 Best 52-Week Low NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Now. On April 1, 2026, Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP) and JDE Peet’s announced that KDP had acquired 96.22% of the shares of JDE Peet’s in the offer. The company also named Rafael Oliveira as CEO of its […]
